'''ladhava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeitgeist|zeitgeist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeitgeist|zeitgeist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ladhava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lædhævæth|lædhævæth]] || [[word:lædhævæj|lædhævæj]] || [[word:lædhævæsh|lædhævæsh]] || [[word:lædhævæ|lædhævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladhadhavath|ladhadhavath]] || [[word:ladhadhavaj|ladhadhavaj]] || [[word:ladhadhavash|ladhadhavash]] || [[word:ladhadhava|ladhadhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladhavath|ladhavath]] || [[word:ladhavaj|ladhavaj]] || [[word:ladhavash|ladhavash]] || [[word:ladhava|ladhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladhafvath|ladhafvath]] || [[word:ladhafvaj|ladhafvaj]] || [[word:ladhafvash|ladhafvash]] || [[word:ladhafvaf|ladhafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ladhavatha|ladhavatha]] || [[word:ladhavaja|ladhavaja]] || [[word:ladhavasha|ladhavasha]] || [[word:ladhavaka|ladhavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ladhavath|ladhavath]] || [[word:ladhavaj|ladhavaj]] || [[word:ladhavash|ladhavash]] || [[word:ladhava|ladhava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ladhavathal|ladhavathal]] || [[word:ladhavajal|ladhavajal]] || [[word:ladhavashal|ladhavashal]] || [[word:ladhavakal|ladhavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ladhavathatha|ladhavathatha]] || [[word:ladhavajaja|ladhavajaja]] || [[word:ladhavashasha|ladhavashasha]] || [[word:ladhavaka|ladhavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ladhavathan|ladhavathan]] || [[word:ladhavajan|ladhavajan]] || [[word:ladhavashan|ladhavashan]] || [[word:ladhavakan|ladhavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ladhavathaoro|ladhavathaoro]] || [[word:ladhavajaoro|ladhavajaoro]] || [[word:ladhavashaoro|ladhavashaoro]] || [[word:ladhavakaoro|ladhavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
